title: User ID column question
excerpt: I’m trying to set up some integrations for a payroll software and I was hoping for a way that I can have a User ID column. I know each user has an ID, is there a way to bring that information into a board?

posts.author: nstephenson (Nate Stephenson)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m trying to set up some integrations for a payroll software and I was hoping for a way that I can have a User ID column. I know each user has an ID, is there a way to bring that information into a board?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there! While there isn’t a User ID column, if you have an Enterprise account you can create Column Templates!

Then, you could customize a Status Column or Dropdown Column and input each user’s ID as the labels in these columns. Then, you make this column a template and now you can add this specific column type to any board you are working on and need to have all the User ID options available.

Does this sound like a suitable workaround?
